happy_path_tests.description: Main menu loads and exit works
Invalid menu choice shows error, doesn't crash
Phone lookup with valid Dutch number (no API key, no export)
Non-numeric menu input falls through gracefully

_notes.validator_mode: static | full | agent. static = static analysis + optional Claude review (silent if no key). full = static first, then real agent if key present. agent = real agent directly; falls back to static if no key.
_notes.edge_case_template: '{input}' is replaced with each edge case value. Prefix '5\n' navigates to phone lookup; suffix 'exit\n' handles the invalid-number loop exiting.
_notes.expected_output: Comma-separated keywords; any one keyword present = pass.
_notes.timeout_seconds: Per-test timeout in seconds. Increase if the project has slow network calls.
